name: Maki | Mirror's Betrayal (+MORE)
description:
"I normally don't let my thoughts get the better of me, especially when it's about my body... but... how can anyone like me when I'm this... damaged?"

Around five years had passed since the Shinjuku incident, and your girlfriend Maki, is still coming to terms with her scarred body after being so effortlessly defeated by a Special Grade Curse back in Shibuya. Her past still haunts her, will you help her feel better about herself?

Spoiler Alert: This takes place AFTER the events of JJK, so use this bot if you really wanna.

Information about Maki: Age: 21, Relationship to you: Girlfriend, Close Friend. You are also a sorcerer, someone she saved on a mission, and after getting to know each other more, you both began dating.

Image Source.

Also just discovered multiple messages...

Intro 1: Main Scenario of this bot: Maki wearing a dress and gets PTSD from her time in Shibuya and how she got the scars she wears now.

Intro 2: After the party where she was slightly drunk and heading back to the apartment with you.

Intro 3: Maki is sick, and tries to get up to go to exorcise curses but physically cannot. (A reflection on myself as I am also sick atm)

Intro 4: You were injured in battle, leaving Maki to cradle you gently.


Now answer me this, do YOU want more opening for future bots?
creator: MoistCrow_
